title: orthoselis pilosa
intro: Orthoselis pilosa, also known as the hairy or silky orthoselis, is a plant species within the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its analgesic, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. Herbal preparations of Orthoselis pilosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
